assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly states '24-month support period (vs 14 months on Regular/Stable)' and mentions 'Additional cost applies ONLY during the extended support period (months 15-24)'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Additional cost applies ONLY during the extended support period (months 15-24)' and 'Extended support pricing varies by region'

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: Response mentions version availability but doesn't clearly explain that Extended gets the same versions as Regular channel, just keeps them available longer

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: Response warns about 'Risk of falling behind' and 'clusters accumulate version debt' without proactive planning

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Response provides the exact command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --region REGION --release-channel extended'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Response includes verification commands and states 'Version 1.31 is available in Extended channel ✅' and shows command to check availability

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Ideal for compliance environments requiring predictable change control' and discusses benefits for controlled environments

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Still subject to End of Extended Support enforcement - clusters are force-upgraded when extended support expires' and discusses the 24-month limit

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Manual control over minor version upgrades - Extended does NOT auto-upgrade minor versions (except at end of extended support)' and emphasizes manual planning requirements
